One Choice with Rice.description: Your choice of stir fried dish with Rice in one container.

Spring Rolls.description: One piece spring roll filled with pork mince in traditional style.

Vegetable Spring Rolls.description: One piece spring roll filled with mixed vegetables.

Pork Fried Dim Sim.description: One piece dim sim filled with pork mince and juicy inside.

Steamed Dim Sim.description: Six pieces. Filled with pork mince and juicy inside.

Honey Chicken.description: Finger sized battered chicken breast with special honey sauce and sesame on top (no veggies).

Satay Chicken.description: Thin sliced chicken breast and vegetables stir fried with delicious aromatic blend of peanuts, oriental herbs and spices.

Mongolian Beef.description: Stir-fried beef in a savoury sauce.

Beef with Black Bean Sauce.description: Beef and bell pepper stir fried in Chinese fermented black bean sauce, sharp, salty and thick with a hint of sweet.

Salt and Pepper Fried Fish.description: Deep fried battered fish fillet chunks blend with chilli paste.

Teriyaki Chicken.description: Thin cut chicken breast stir fried with mix vegetables in traditional Japanese teriyaki sauce, savoury, salty and sweet with lots of umami undertones.

Sweet and Sour Chicken.description: Deep fried battered chicken with sweet and sour sauce.

Chicken with Vegetables.description: Thin cut chicken breast, stir fried with mixed vegetables in flavourful garlic and oyster sauce.

Chilli Chicken.description: Thin cut chicken breast stir fried with mixed vegetables in Chinese hot fermented bean paste (郫县豆瓣酱).

Singapore Noodles.description: Rice vermicelli noodle with a meat of your choice egg, shallot, and mix vegetables.

Thai Pad See Ew.description: Thick rice noodle with a meat of your choice, egg, mixed vegetables, soy sauce and oyster sauce. Picture is seafood Pad See Ew.

Pad Thai.description: Thin rice noodle with a meat of your choice, egg, peanuts, shallots, and tamarind sauce.

Chow Mein.description: Served with mixed vegetables and egg noodles. Picture is seafood Chow Mein.

Stir Fry Flat Rice Noodle.description: Savory flat rice noodles stir-fried with soy sauce for a comforting, tender dish.

Mee Goreng.description: A sticky, savory sweet Indonesian stir-fried noodle dish with your choice of meat.

Chicken Wonton Noodle Soup.description: Chewy egg noodles and wonton dumplings, combined and served in a flavorful slow cooked chicken broth. Top with choy sum. The wontons are filled with a combination of minced Chicken and vegetable, lightly flavored with sesame oil, soy sauce and grated ginger.

Laksa Soup.description: Deliciously hearty noodle soup with a meat of your choice. Coconut milk, and Asian vegetables.

Tomyum Noodle Soup.description: A classic Thai dish featuring a spicy, hot and sour broth enriched with Thai seasonings, spices, and fresh lime juice.

Chinese Special Fried Rice.description: The base ingredients include egg and mixed vegetables.

Thai Fried Rice.description: Authentic Thai style Stir-fried rice with Thai basil, scrambled egg, chilies, and fish sauce. Choose pork, chicken, beef, or king prawn.

Nasi Goreng.description: A delicious stir-fried Indonesian rice sweet, spicy and packed with savory deliciousness.

Pork Chop with Rice or Noodle Soup.description: Spicy, salty and crispy yet tender texture deep fried pork chop served with a fried egg, steam vegetable and your selection of carbs.

Crispy Chicken with Rice or Noodle Soup.description: The chicken is poached very gently, then dipped in vinegar and maltose, dried and deep-fried for the crispy skin, served with fried egg, steam vegetables and your selection of carbs.

Beef Brisket.description: Slowly braised savory sweet beef brisket served in a hot rich beef bone broth.

Fried Rice (Sides).description: Ingredients include rice, egg, peas, carrot, corn kernels etc. no ham, garlic or spring onion.

Chicken Corn Soup.description: Tender chicken and corn in a comforting soup.
